organizerOnly: This page is for organizers only.

globalImages.title: Global Teaser Images
globalImages.description: Images shown as full-screen slides on ALL event presentations. Event-specific images can be added per event in the event Settings tab.
globalImages.limitReached: Maximum of {{max}} global teaser images reached.
globalImages.positionError: Failed to update slide position. Please try again.

emailForwarding.title: Email Forwarding
emailForwarding.subtitle: Configure email forwarding recipients for batbern.ch addresses.
emailForwarding.supportContactsHelp: Comma-separated email addresses. If empty, emails to support@batbern.ch are forwarded to all organizers.
